title: Action by seizing creditor who has been compelled to reimburse purchaser
doc_html:
Art. 2381.  Action by seizing creditor who has been compelled to reimburse purchaser

The seizing creditor may recover from his judgment debtor whatever he has had to pay to the purchaser who has been evicted.
doc_text:
Art. 2381.  Action by seizing creditor who has been compelled to reimburse purchaser
The seizing creditor may recover from his judgment debtor whatever he has had to pay to the purchaser who has been evicted.
